testcase.name: test_payment_stripe

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_new_endpoints.py:135: in test_payment_stripe self._run_provider(run_id, "stripe") backend/tests/test_new_endpoints.py:122: in _run_provider assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
